content.text:
It means I-- 

*[stops again, longer this time]*

It means he was wrong to. Take a chance on me.

*[quieter]*

Like maybe I'm not actually... maybe I can't actually do this job. Not at this level. And everyone would see that. My team, my boss, my -- 

*[quick recovery, voice tightens]*

But that's not going to happen because I'm going to prep. That's why I need to figure out the list, that's why I'm here, I just need to get organized and then I can --

*[trails off]*

Sorry. What were we -- yeah. The prep. What do I need to have ready for Thursday.
